name: Turkey with Apricots and Chiles
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Nondiet tub-style canola margarine or corn oil
1 lb Cooked turkey breast meat, cut into bite-sized pieces
Apricots sliced into strips for garnish, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions.
2. In a Dutch oven or similar large pot, combine margarine, onion, garlic, and 2 tablespoons broth. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently until the onion is soft, about 5-6 minutes. If liquid begins to evaporate, add a bit more broth.
3. Stir in cumin, coriander, and allspice. Add remaining broth, apricots, chiles, and tomato. Stir to mix well. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes, or until flavors are well-blended.
4. Stir in turkey and cook an additional 5 minutes.
5. Serve over rice, garnished with apricot strips if desired.
